summary: Iteration 11: Chat Enhancements Testing. All requested features verified working. Backend supports translation (Arabic text confirmed), multi-turn conversation with history, depth settings (fast/balanced/deep), and returns markdown-formatted responses. Frontend shows welcome message with 6 quick action chips, functional chat settings with depth options, and markdown rendering in AI responses.

minor.issue: Occasional transient 502 errors during AI generation - likely due to long processing time. Auto-recovers on retry.

passed_tests: 2. GET /api/sources - 3 indexed sources available (SOW-H@H, H@H Phased Scope, Slide Deck)
3. POST /api/chat with translation request - Returns Arabic text with proper Unicode characters (\u0600-\u06FF range)
4. POST /api/chat with history array - Maintains context for follow-up questions (verified 'first item mentioned earlier' reference)
5. POST /api/chat with depth='fast' - Returns concise response
6. POST /api/chat with depth='deep' - Returns thorough detailed response
7. API responses contain markdown formatting (**, bullets, headers)
8. Frontend: Chat tab accessible via navigation
9. Frontend: 'What would you like to do?' welcome message displays when sources indexed and no messages
10. Frontend: All 6 quick action chips visible with data-testids (translate-to-arabic, translate-to-english, summarize-sources, key-findings, compare-sources, extract-action-items)
11. Frontend: Chat settings gear button opens depth options bar
12. Frontend: Depth options (Fast/Balanced/Deep) visible and clickable
13. Frontend: Quick action chip click triggers API call and shows loading indicator
14. Frontend: AI response renders markdown - bullet points (disc markers) and bold text visible
15. Frontend: Citations display below AI responses
16. Frontend: Regenerate button visible in chat header
critical_code_review_comments: MdText component (lines 8-74) properly renders markdown: headers, bold, italic, lists, inline code
sendMessage function (line 665) correctly sends history and chatDepth to API
regenerateLast function (line 721) properly uses real API with history for regeneration
Quick action chips at line 2414 have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Chat depth setting is persistent during session via chatDepth state
seed_data_creation: Used existing indexed sources: SOW-H@H, H@H Phased Scope, Slide Deck
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chat enhancements fully tested and working. Backend /api/chat endpoint handles: 1) Translation (returns Arabic text), 2) Multi-turn conversation (history array), 3) Depth settings (fast/balanced/deep), 4) Markdown in responses. Frontend shows quick action chips when sources indexed and messages empty. MdText component renders markdown properly. All 6 quick action chips have data-testid attributes. Regenerate button uses real API. Chat depth options visible when clicking settings gear. AI responses may take 10-30 seconds.

verified_features.translation_support: Working - Arabic text returned with proper Unicode
verified_features.multi_turn_conversation: Working - History array processed, context maintained
verified_features.markdown_rendering: Working - MdText component renders bold, bullets, headers
verified_features.quick_action_chips: Working - 6 chips with correct prompts and data-testids
verified_features.regenerate_button: Working - Uses real API with history
